ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest1.desc: &6Crouch + Right Click&r the Grass Block &2WITH EMPTY HAND&r to get stone pebbles. Use these pebbles to &6Craft&r Stone.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest10.des: To obtain Flint, you should &6craft&r 3 blocks of Gravel into one piece of Flint.
You cannot get Flint from breaking Gravel in this modpack!
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest12.des: Bed is important, we don't want Phantoms interrupting you in creating your factory.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest13.des: Simply turns plant materials into water.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest14.des: (Tip: All connected Sieves up to 2 blocks away with the same tier of Mesh will sieve together, as long as you have enough blocks in hand)
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest16.sub: Craft one, get another one free!
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest17.sub: Craft one, get one more for completely free!
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest18.sub: Obtain one, you will be blessed with another one!
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest19.sub: Yup, you will get another one of this as well
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest2.desc: To get dirt you have to break Grass Block right beneath you.
You have &63 ways&r to do that:
1) Break 1 and &6fall down&r with and try to catch it (void will not kill you)
2) &6Build underneath&r it with stone and break 1 safely (yes, you can build under blocks here!)
3) Quickly &6Replace&r a grass block with a stone, the dirt block should pop up on top of your newly placed stone (but stay close to it to collect it quickly)
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest20.des: Note: This quest unlocks the Otherside dimension to loot and explore!
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest20.sub: You know the drill by now
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest21.des: &6Craft&r a Crafting Table using Planks and Flint
You can craft stuff using Philosopher's Stone (&6C&r key by default), but the Crafting Table now keeps its contents, making it more handy for repeated crafting processes.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest22.sub: Can't do a barrel roll with this one
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest23.des: Have an iron bucket as a reward for your hard work so far.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest24.des: It has many culinary uses, but right now you'll be doing something else with it.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest26.des: Is your Stone looking like this?
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest27.sub: Because furnaces need to be solid
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest29.des: Made by putting a &6barrel&r full of water onto of &6mycelium&r.
Uses you should be currently interested in are:
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest3.desc: Getting the precious sand block is as simple as &6Transmuting&r Dirt or Grass with your &6Philosopher's Stone&r.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest31.des: You can use it for mushrooms, but it's more important to create &6Witch water&r.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest32.des: Put a Sand Block inside a Barrel full of &6Witchwater&r.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest32.sub: How many faces do you see on it?
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest33.des: Next quests from this row will simply require you to do some &6Transmutation&r with the Phillosopher's Stone.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest34.sub: Always good to have some Quartz
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest38.des: Used exclusively to melt down Gravel or rocks into &6Lava&r.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest39.des: A quick reminder, porcelain buckets &6Break&r after you pour Lava out of it
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest40.des: Note: To actually collect Obsidian, use a barrel
Also you can note that building Nether Portal from Obsidian is &6no longer an option&r, please be patient and let quests guide you to the it.
You will visit Nether in the &6Chapter 3&r!
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest41.des: Putting Dust in a Barrel full of water will make Clay.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest45.des: The &6Transmutation Table&r is the &6Most Important&r tool. Take a look at for example Dirt's tooltip, you will find
Check JEI for all possible transmutations.
Note: Philosopher's Stone also has a number of different functionalities. Check &6Controls&r menu to see everything you can do with it.
"&eEMC:&r 1 (:x:)", if you put an item that has this under its name into the table(fire icon), it will change the :x: to a :white_check_mark: which means you have learned it.
Primary, unprocessed materials have their own, unique &6EMC Value&r for which you can take it out of the table if you have added it to it before and if you have enough EMC(like money).

When you start mixing or infusing those primary resources, they unfortunately &6Lose&r their EMC value. This is why you will need to &6Manufacture&r all of the secondary resources, this is your main goal in this pack.
You can use "Philosopher's Stone" on a block to &6Transform&r it to another block.
&4(don't do that with blocks you're standing on!)&r
Obsidian >> Lava (be careful with this one, lol)
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest46.des: In case you lost yours... please don't abuse.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest47.sub: To spice up your stone platform
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest49.des: Note: Tools are &6upgradable&r in this pack.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest49.sub: Don't get rid of this one!
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest5.desc: Sandstone has a special property. It can be &6Transmuted&r into Gravel.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest50.des: Can be obtained by &6Sieving&r Dirt or Gravel with Flint Mesh or better.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest50.sub: Doesn't feel good in your shoe
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest51.sub: You either love it or hate it
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest52.des: Starting from Flint Mesh, &6Sieving&r Dirt will sometimes yield you Zinc Ore Chunks.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest54.des: Remember to check which items can go into &6Transmutation Table&r.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest56.des: First main alloy in Create, you'll be using it quite a lot.
Combine &6all&r the things you made here so far.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest59.des: Think of it as a machine casing for all the &cAndesite Age&r mechines.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest6.desc: He would chuck, he would, as much as he could, and chuck as much wood as a woodchuck would if a woodchuck could chuck wood.
NOTE: I don't know what drugs this guy is on but, you can &6crouch&r or &6sprint&r next to a crop to grow it &6faster&r. (different descriptor!)
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest6.subt: How much wood would a woodchuck chuck?
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest60.des: &6Encased Fan&r unlocks quite a few processing possibilities.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest63.des: The Water Wheel utilizes flowing water to generate &6Rotational Force&r. Every single contraption is powered by it.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest64.des: To obtain this mighty chunk of Coal, &6Sieve&r Gravel
...or &6Transmute&r 4 pieces of Charcoal using your Philosopher's Stone.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest66.des: Not actually edible, but you'll want a handful of these.
Made by combining &6kelp&r and &6clay&r in a crafting grid.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest67.des: Still not edible, but useful for making a certain alloy.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest68.des: Note: &6Helve Hammer&r is only used later on for automation, manual crafting doesn't require it.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest69.sub: No, you cannot put it on your hat
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest7.desc: &6Harvest&r the Spiderweb Fruit to obtain String
Right-Clicking will allow you to harvest the same friut unlimited amount of times
(Tip: If you get close enough, you can repeatedly crouch to &6Accelerate&r growth of saplings, fruit, or many crops)
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest70.des: Nice and flat, perfect for propellers.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest70.sub: Enjoy it's shine while it lasts
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest71.des: It's nice to have different options available, isn't it?
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest71.sub: If Oak is not enough for you
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest8.desc: Spiderweb trees grow with oak leaves, you souldn't have any problems with this one.
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.quest8.subt: An Oak tree a day keeps pollution at bay
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.subtitle0: Survive in open space after horrible accident
ftbquests.chapter.0_survivor.title: 0. Surviving Age
ftbquests.chapter.10_electric_age.quest2: Put a coal into &6Metallurgic Infuser&r to transform it into &0Carbon&r.
ftbquests.chapter.10_electric_age.quest5: There a few ores for you to get from there, so I hope you aren't afraid of small spaces!
Click here to learn how to get there.
ftbquests.chapter.10_electric_age.title: 10. Electric Age
Look at the machine or a tank with &6Ethylene&r gas to complete the quest.
ftbquests.chapter.12_atomic_age.quest2.d: Please note that there is no "&6Spent Nuclear Waste&r" in the pack.
So you will &6re-use&r all &2Nuclear Waste&r really soon!
Useless for now, essential in the future.
ftbquests.chapter.12_atomic_age.quest6.d: There's a whole lot more left to explore for you.
Here are listed just simplest examples of what can be used.
ftbquests.chapter.12_atomic_age.quest6.s: The list goes on and on
ftbquests.chapter.12_atomic_age.title: 11. Chemical Age
Output Power produced by Industrial Turbine to a bigger Power Storage: &2Induction Matrix&r!
1. Pump "&8Fission Fuel&r" into Fission Reactor Port configured as "&2Input Only&r"
2. Connect &eRadioactive Waste Barrel&r to the Fission Reactor Port configured as "&6Output Waste&r"
3. Connect &9Industrial Turbine&r to the Fission Reactor Port configured as "&bOutput Coolant&r"
4. Configure Reactor's "Rate Limit" to a safe value
5. Start the Reactor to produce &2Nuclear Waste&r.
P.S. Don't forget to output actual electrical power produced by Industrial Turbine.
ftbquests.chapter.13_nuclear_age.title: 12. Atomic Age
Much better, multi-dimensional, higher capacity, totally wireless, and absolutely &6OP storage system&r.
&6Storage Cells&r to put into QIO Drive Array.
Consider crafting a highest tier one, and most likely you'll NEVER be able to even fill it in half.
Wireless dashboard to put anywhere in the base or even ANYWHERE IN THE WORLD (any distance), and reach your storage system easily.
Configurable importer that can put items &6from&r any inventory &6into the QIO system&r.
Configurable exporter that can put items &6into&r any inventory &6from the QIO system&r.
Configurable &6Redstone Adapter&r that can produce redstone signal when any &6item reached certain capacity&r in the QIO system.
&6Pocket Terminal&r to reach QIO storage from any place on any planet.
Consider building yourself a safeplace as deep underground as possible.
There are rumors that &5Wither Storm&r is living somewhere on the surface.
You have only 1 chance to kill &5Wither Storm&r, so please be careful and don't fuck it up.
The monster will not drop the core of it's power (&5Withered Nether Star&r) unless it's fully evolved to the &97th stage&r.
&5Wither Storm&r a.k.a Planet Destroyer is a terrifying monster that got its hands on the almighty &6Command Block&r.
Wither Storm destroyed a lot of planets and now it's moving to our homeplanet Earth!
What a luck to meet him somewhere far from home.
Find monster's restplace and summon the monster!
Place one of the missing &8Wither Skeleton Skulls&r on top of the &6Command Block&r.
Wither Storm: Find And Summon Wither Storm
Let the monster reach their full potential before killing it, otherwise it won't drop the needed loot!
Stage 5 (&l&2CAN BE BLOWN UP WITH FORMIDIBOMB&r&r):
Wait for the monster to reach 5th stage and summon &5Withered Symbiont&r!
Kill the Symbiont and gather "&6Command Block Book&r" - a fraction of the Wither Storm power.
Observe all stages on the next pages.
Wither Storm: Let Him Grow \& Summon Symbiont
Wither Storm: Kill Withered Symbiont \& Obtain Command Block Book
Finish Glacio explorations and &6return back to Earth&r for the last pieces of your journey.
Wither Storm: Prepare For Second Encounter
If you found yourself having a &5Wither Sickness&r - don't worry, you can master a cure for it.
Blow up the &5Wither Storm&r and approach &6Command Block&r that appeared out of its body.
Wither Storm: Blow Wither Storm Up
&5Wither Storm&r is resurrected and it's now in the Stage 6:
- Each body will eventually grow 3 heads, making it 9 heads
Wither Storm: Observe Wither Storm Arise Once Again
Get your hands on another &6Command Block Book&r, but don't spend it crafting another Formidibomb.
Wither Storm: Defeat Symbiont Once Again
Craft any &6Command Block Tool&r, immune to the Command Block powers.
It has infinite durability and has powers to destroy Wither Storm's Command Block.
After the tool is crafted - wait for &5Wither Storm&r to grow big enough.
Wither Storm: Any Command Block Tool
Wait for &5Wither Storm&r to reach Stage 7.
It will open a path into a &5Wither Storm&r's guts.
Wither Storm: Enter Wither Storm's Belly
&6Advanced Storage Cells&r to put into QIO Drive Array.
ftbquests.chapter.14_astral_age.title: 14. Astral Age
ftbquests.chapter.14_god.quest1.descript: Thank you for coming this far in the modpack!
At this point you've finished technical progression, but you still can spend some time and become a true GOD with creative items.
ftbquests.chapter.14_god.quest1.title: Welcome, GOD!
ftbquests.chapter.14_god.quest14.descrip: Can you resummon Wither Storm wherever you want with that?
I mean, if you're the GOD now...
ftbquests.chapter.14_god.quest14.title: What The Hell Are You Plotting?
ftbquests.chapter.14_god.title: 15. GOD
ftbquests.chapter.14_nuclear_physics_age: To produce Heavy Water you need to use &3Electric Pump&r with &5Filter Upgrade&r.
Just pump water with it, and it will filter heavy water molecules out of regular water.
This chapter will show you steps required to automate &6Kinetic Mechanism&r.
You can think of &6Quests&r as singular machines.
ftbquests.chapter.1_andesite_age.quest10: Hint: This and &6Zinc Nugget&r can be made using the same machine, if you don't care about aesthetics.
ftbquests.chapter.1_andesite_age.quest11: Just like &6Wood&r processing quest line, sometimes you need to use the same machine more than once to achieve desired effect.
ftbquests.chapter.1_andesite_age.quest12: Too grindy to manually crush it.
ftbquests.chapter.1_andesite_age.quest13: Note: &6Subtitle&r suggets a mod that will also be helpful.
ftbquests.chapter.1_andesite_age.quest14: If you are stuck on how to automate &6Logs&r production, remember your best friend, &6JEI&r.
Tip: You can also try &6Pondering&r about &6Mechanical Saw&r.
ftbquests.chapter.1_andesite_age.quest15: You probably guessed &6Mechanical Saw&r is your best friend in this questline.
ftbquests.chapter.1_andesite_age.quest16: Just like &6Cobblestone&r processing quest line, sometimes you need to use the same machine more than once to achieve desired effect.
ftbquests.chapter.1_andesite_age.quest17: &6Diamond Saw&r has the most durability of all the Saws available to you at this point, which means you don't have to resupply the &6Deplyer&r as often.
ftbquests.chapter.1_andesite_age.quest18: And off you go to the next chapter!
(I hope you're having fun so far :D)
You can't automate this one yet
ftbquests.chapter.1_andesite_age.quest19: "Guys, I think he wants us to check &6JEI&r for instructions.
This is your final assembly for this chapter. Remember to take healthy breaks!
ftbquests.chapter.1_andesite_age.quest20: Gather &6Useful Machines&r now, then you'll be able to create contraptions without being limited by materials
ftbquests.chapter.1_andesite_age.quest21: Power has to be transmitted around somehow, doesn't it?
ftbquests.chapter.1_andesite_age.quest22: These have many more uses beyond this one.
A step we need to take
Note: This and &6Clay&r can be created using the same machine, to save space.
I'd like to mention that &6Fan behind Lava&r is most broken form of smelting I've ever seen.
It's possible you've already used this method, as it's more efficient than crafting by hand.
If you haven't, check &6JEI&r and think how much EMC have you wasted by not using it as soon as you could.
I think name speaks for itself.
If it doesn't, check &6JEI&r for instructions.
Are you proud of yourself now?
There is exactly one block of difference between the automatic &6Cobblestone&r, &6Andesite&r and &6Diorite&r setups.
Remember about your ability to &6Ponder&r about all of the Create components, even items from some add-ons are able to be &6Pondered&r about.
If you are stuck on how to automate &6Kelp&r production, you can check &6JEI&r for instructions.
I like to grow it, grow it
ftbquests.chapter.1_andesite_age.title: 1. Andesite Age
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest1.de: This chapter gives you access to &6Copper&r and more.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest10.d: You can make those in pairs by using the &6Rolling Mill&r on our &6Sheets&r.
Please note, later you will be able to use Tinkers Construct's casting of a Molten Copper as well!
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest11.d: Polished Coke is made by, well... Polishing it with a &6Sand Paper&r
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest11.s: Nice and shiny, just as if it was &6Polished&r
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest12.d: Refer back to &6Chapter 1&r if you are confused.
&6Stripped Logs&r will do as well if you are wondering.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest13.d: &6Screwdriver&r is a tool used to make a few Mechanisms.
TIP: Use a drawer to restock deployers less often.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest15.d: &6Nourished Coke&r is made by taking Coke for a bath in the &6Mixer&r.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest16.d: For convenience, you might want to use &6Botany Pots&r though.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest17.d: You could make paper in similar manner to how it is made in real life...
If you don't know how, check JEI and learn a new thing! :smile:
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest17.s: I really hope we won't have to put it together with Sand
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest18.d: And then make Sand, you already know how.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest18.s: Maybe you'd get some beaches Franklin
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest19.d: If you are clever and have some spare EMC, soon you will be able use a more durable material for a better Sandpaper.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest2.de: You &6can't give up&r now, don't listen to chapter 1 and &6&lgrind more&r&r.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest2.su: Your fate is sealed! You will finish me!
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest21.d: Mill your Wobble-Cobble down to Gravel.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest21.s: The same chain all over again...
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest22.d: As mentioned before, a better version of &6Sandpaper&r exists.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest3.de: Charcoal can be made by &6Smelting&r any type of log.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest4.de: This bad boy is made by letting your &6Charcoal&r through your smelting setup once more.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest5.de: Granite can be generated infinitely using the &6Mechanical Extruder&r. &6JEI&r pls help!!
Another handy way is to sieve &6Gravel&r and combine Granite Pebbles in a 2x2 gird.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest6.su: The way all granite should be. Crushed.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest7.de: Copper nuggets are obtained by &6Washing&r Crushed Gratine.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest7.su: Small, shiny and red ... what is it?
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest8.su: Like really do I need to?
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.quest9.de: Made by pressing Copper Ingots with &6Mechanical Press&r.
ftbquests.chapter.2_copper_age.title: 2. Copper Age
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest1.des: The start of another adventure. Oh wait, you're not new!
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest11.de: Made yet again by washing &6Crushed Diorite&r.
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest13.de: Mix a &6Quartz Crystal&r with some &6Liqiud Redstone&r in a basin.
Note: This quest unlocks the Nether dimension for you to loot and explore!
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest14.de: Made by &6Melting&r anything related to Iron. Nuggets, blocks, ingots... Bars?
Search by Tooltip Only: Type # in front of a word (#capacity)
Search by OreDict name: Type $ in front of a word ($ingot)
Search by Creative Tab: Type %% in front of a word (%%Nature)
Multiple Searches: Separate terms with | characters ("wrench|hammer")
Searching for "@tinkers #heart" should show you all possible items for The Heat Source.
Melting is done either in the &6Smeltery multiblock&r or the &6Melter&r. Remember to use something as The Heat Source.
TIP: JEI can also help you search for specific items by &6Special Tags&r.
Search by Mod Name or ModID: Type @ in front of a word (@tinker)
Exclude search terms: Type - in front of a word (@create -small)
Search terms that have spaces in them: Type "" around the words ("two words")
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest15.de: TIP: At this point you should try incorporating &6EMC links&r or &6Energy Conensers&r in your factories.
Remember though if you play on a server, your EMC Links &6Don't Work&r when you are not connected!
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest16.de: Can be obtained by &6Mixing&r skystone dust and water.
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest17.de: There are &6plenty&r ways to do this.
To learn you basic options to generate power, click here:
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest18.su: You should already know this one
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest19.de: Oh wow it's &6Growing&r. Just like I told you it would. Now you definitely should &6EMCify&r it.
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest2.des: The final piece to unlock the &6Brass Age&r.
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest23.de: You can make this using an &6Mechanical Extruder&r or by making a simple &6Cobblestone Generator&r.
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest27.de: Spit on it with water and it shall &6&lGROW&r.
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest29.de: Made by &6Crushing&r skystone which has an &6EMC&r value.
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest31.de: You can get your first Sky Stone from &6Smelting&r Sky Stone Dust.
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest32.de: To manually create your first Sky Stone Dust you will need &6Gem Dust&r, &6Gunpowder&r and &6Cloud in a Bottle&r.
1. "Gem Dust" can be obtained by dropping Anvil onto a Apotheosis Gem.
1.1 Apotheosis Gems can be found as a loot from mobs.
2. Cloud in a Bottle can be obtained by right clicking empty bottle in the sky on &6cloud level&r (Y=192)
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest32.su: So high, I believe I can fly!!
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest4.des: Like I said, it's used to make more than just sealed mechanisms.
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest5.des: Made by spouting &6Molten Iron&r onto &6Rose Quartz&r.
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest6.des: This one is made by casting &6Molten Brass&r onto a &6Casting Table&r with a cast of your choice, preferably the &6Nugget Cast&r.
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest6.sub: The casting is so good in this movie
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest7.des: &6Molten Brass&r is made by alloying &6Molten Copper&r and &6Molten Zinc&r together in the Smeltery or the Alloy Tank.
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest8.des: Everything is melting in exact same way.
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.quest9.des: Yeah, its the same here as well, I forgot. Molten Copper requires you to use &6Copper&r tho.
ftbquests.chapter.3_brass_age.title: 3. Brass Age
ftbquests.chapter.4_inductive_age.quest1: &6Still&r reading me? Come on you gotta become more&6 independent&r.
But if you really &6need&r me. Then fine. I'll &6help&r you. :smile:
I got bored of Gravel and Gravity puns
I really hope you've learned the basics by now.
You should have some by now. You crafted them in &6chapter 0&r.
If only there was a block that &6Links&r directlt to your &6EMC&r...
Teleportation? how? I- I dont believe it.
Made &6Exclusively&r in Mechanical Crafters in a &62x2 grid&r.
But now we drain the &6Green&r ones.
But can also be made by &6Draning&r red balls using a Drain. &7[foreshadowing]&r
Crush a &6Chromatic Singularity&r to make &6Paint Balls&r of all kinds.
We now use our &6Entangled Singularities&r and &6Any Dye&r to make a &6Chromatic Singularity&r.
ftbquests.chapter.4_inductive_age.quest2: There are a lot of different ways to get your hands on the dyes, pick the one that suits you!

In this chapter you have to perform some basic math operations as well as some BOOLEAN math!
Complete freedom of how you will do that, Have Fun!
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest12: Seven human souls are required to shatter the Barrier
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest13: Tilt your head and you'll see Infinity!
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest15: Blueprints for some of the casts got lost in the time-space continuum.
You need to prove your capability of solving basic and intermediate math problems.
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest16: Now try to get 10 numbers and 2 boolean states out of 2 numbers and 15 symbols.
The calculator can help you if you're stuck
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest17: Plus Cast is used to cast a Plus.
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest18: Minus Cast is used to cast a Minus.
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest19: Divide Cast is used to cast a Sivision symbol.
Divided by oceans, united by Minecraft
These can be used to create the simplest of Industrial Machines.
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest20: Multiply Cast is used to cast a Multiplication symbol.
Multiple hours of fun ahead of you
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest21: This liquid is similar to Liquid Matrix in structure, but is missing some core elements.
Your task is to make everything you can out of it to be able to complete the structure.
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest22: I'm starting to think it's something more than just a magnet.
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest23: Liquid Matrix uses a &6Crystal Matrix Ingot&r as a catalyst to harden and take a solid form.
Good thing is that process does not destroy your ingot, meaning you can reuse it as much as you wish.
Now you're the one in control of the Matrix
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest24: Remember that 9 is the highest number you can get.
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest25: Substracting is safe, you can't go below 0 though.
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest28: All math operations can be done also in a &6Basic Crafting Table&r
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest29: Factorial is a somewhat tricky operation.
The factorial of a positive integer "n" is defined as the product of all positive integers from 1 to n. For example, &65! = 5 * 4 * 3 * 2 * 1 = 120&r.
I bet your factory is pretty big by now.
If &6Preformance&r is starting to worsen, consider &6Spreading out&r your assembly lines a bit.
Now you have plenty of options to transfer everything wirelessly.
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest30: The power (or exponent) of a number says how many times to use the number in a multiplication.
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest31: Remainder is a quite funny operation actually.
Remainder operation returns the, well, remainder from division.
It's best seen on an example:
This equation can be also formed as follows:
r stands for &6Remainder&r. Here, have some more examples:
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest32: Square root actually means "to the power of (1/2)"
It must be hard for plants to grow square roots
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest33: Factorial Cast is used to cast a Factorial.
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest34: Power Cast is used to cast a Power symbol.
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest35: Remainder Cast is used to cast a Remainder symbol.
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest36: Square root Cast is used to cast a Square Root symbol.
In Minecraft even the roots are square!
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest37: When you slap two = symbols together, you get an operator to compare two pieces of data, including numbers and expressions.
If you ever wrote any piece of code you will know this one!
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest38: Equal Cast is used to cast an Equality symbol.
I write quest descriptions and you read them. We are not the same
ftbquests.chapter.6_abstruse_age.quest39: It is true that you enjoy this pack

750mB of Latex + 500mB of Water -> 1 Dry Rubber

ftbquests.chapter.charging_and_dischargi: Will charge any items in your inventory as long as it has energy.
Charging Battery (Copper)
Charging Battery (Brass)
Charging Battery (Inductive)
Charging Battery (Calculation)
Charging Battery (Abstruse)
Charging Battery (Integrated)
Charging Battery (Embedded)
Each of Energy Hoppers will charge items in storage containers it's pointing into.
Each of Energy Dischargers presents you with 5 slots to reclaim energy from items.
Mekanism Power Cubes have two slots in the GUI.
One is for charging item with stored energy, and second does the opposite.
Any Mekanism Power Cube
Each of the Energy/Ender Cells (And most Powah generators) has two slots for charging items.
&6Powah Batteries&r are guaranteed to be compatible.
Any Powah Ender or Energy Cell
Once any ME FE Storage Cell is in your ME Drive, use Flux Accessor connected to both ME System and your power source, you can directly access FE from your terminals, just like fluids and gases.
The only difference is "container" items are your energy powered items.
Any ME FE Storage Cell
Portable FE Cell acts just like a &6Huge&r battery you can open anytime and quickly recharge your items, as long as the Cell itself has enough AE stored.
Battery that has to be charged to be used
Any Portable FE Cell
This Chapter covers most solutions related to charging things you can't just attach a cable to.
Quests with rounded edges indicate solutions that charge your items without need to interact with anything.
Unlocks after completing &6Chapter 2&r
For all my tools and jetpacks
Machines are cool, but I need power too!
This component of your late-game Flux Network allows you to wirelessly charge your armor, curios and hotbar (main inventory is disabled).
Will charge all of the items in inventory of player it's bound to via Binding Card.
Required by &6Player Transmitter&r.
Needs to be bound to a single player.
Charging and Discharging

ftbquests.chapter.emc_generation.quest16: In the End dimension, &6Ore Laser Bases&r will generate &5Draconium Ore&r.
&9Bulk Haunting&r is a great way of generating EMC.
Place &9Soul Campfire&r in front of a working &6Fan&r to haunt items.
Please note: output chance is only 25%%!

ftbquests.chapter.fluid_storage.quest6.d: &64 096 000 mB&r (4096 Buckets) of a single fluid.
This is 16 times more compared to &5Ultimate Fluid Tank&r and it can be upgraded without breaking if you wish using &bAbsolute Tier Installer&r.

To get to the End, you need &612&r unique eyes available out of 14 in the End Remastered mod (Srearch @endrem in the recipe browser).
All of the eyes are crafted by placing Eye of Ender on the Crafting Core and respective materials on pedestals around the Crafting Core.
Getting to the End is no easy job
This dimension is a main source of &3Apotheosis Gems&r and &5Blazes&r.
To join the dimension you need to build a vertical frame from &cCompressed Netherrack (1x)&r and light it up with &6Polished Rose Quartz&r!
Find hints about how to get Netherrack on the next page.
&o(other way around will produce Blackstone, you may also get it while you at it!)&r
To join the Mining Dimension you need to build a horizontal frame (at least 2x2) from &6Portable Machine&r and light it up with &dEther Gem&r!
Please pay attention that the frame is strictly horizontal, like the end portal!
So you are finally ready to face the ancient protector of Islands of the End.
Remember that &6End Portal Frames&r have to all be oriented in a specific way.
The easiest way to place Portal Frames correctly is to stand in the middle and place all of them without moving, just turning around.

ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest1.descrip: Stores up to &6108&r stacks of any items!`
&6When a full block is above chest, it still won't open.&r
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest10.descri: No Channels, no cables, much less restrictive types system.
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest10.title: Quantum Item Orchestration system
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest19.descri: This drawer can automatically compact or de-compact resources, one tier at a time.
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest19.title: Simple Compacting Drawer
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest2.descrip: Barrels don't connect to each other, but they can be opened even if it has a full block above itself.
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest20.descri: This drawer can automatically compact or de-compact resources, two tiers at a time.
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest20.title: Compacting drawer
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest21.descri: Ender Chests all share the same inventory, but different for each player.

Here's the improved Ender Chest! It can be configured by dyeing wool pads on the lid. Each configuration has separate inventory, giving you access to a total of 4096 possible combinations. All Ender Chests and Ender Pouches with the same configuration share their inventory, allowing instant item transport over any range.
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest3.descrip: This barrel stores &6108&r stacks of items.
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest4.descrip: Storage Crate doesn't care about maximum stack sizes.
It simply stores up to 640 items, whether it's 10 stacks of Dirt or 640 tools or armor pieces.
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest47.descri: Storage Controller allows you to link all kinds of drawers but Ender Drawers to itself, allowing to interact with all drawers at the same time, from the same block.
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest47.subtit: Interact with all your drawers from one point!
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest47.title: Storage Controller
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest48.descri: Storage Access Point exists because each drawer can only be linked to one Controller. Access Points are, well... Access points that behave the same way as Controllers.
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest48.subtit: Interact with all your drawers from many points!
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest48.title: Controller Access Point
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest49.descri: Armory Cabinet can store a crazy amount of &64096&r items.
The twist is, only items that can't be stacked with anything else can go in there.
On top of that, &6You can't directly interact with it.&r
External storage solution is needed like Create's &6Stock Link&r or &6ME Storage Bus&r.
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest5.descrip: Stores up to 27 stacks of any items.
Can be connected horizontally to another chest to make a double chest, making you able to access both at the same time.
&6When a full block is above chest, it won't open.&r
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest50.descri: Can store &68192 items&r (or &6512 stacks&r) of a single type.
Can be upgraded only with "Utility" upgrades, but multiple Ender Drawers can be connected to synchronize contents, acting like an Ender Chest for single item type.
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest6.descrip: Also acts as an Energy Acceptor for your network.
For more info, refer to AE2 Ingame wiki (Hold "G" by default while hovering over any ME component).
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest7.descrip: Can store &62048 items&r (or &6128 stacks&r) of a single type.
Can be upgraded with various upgrades.
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest8.descrip: Holds 10 ME Drives of any kind.
Can be upgraded into Extended version, which holds 20 drives.
ftbquests.chapter.storage.quest9.descrip: This block has enough space to fit one ME Drive, and also has a Crafting Interface built in to interact with this one drive.
ftbquests.chapter.storage.title: Item Storage

ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest1.descri: &6Angel Rings&r provide you with creative flight, but if you equip or unequip anything, the flight gets &4cancelled&r.
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest1.title: Angel Ring
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest10.descr: Reduces drinking time by 70%% and eating time by 40%%.
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest10.subti: Novelty alternative to Plastic Drinking Hat
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest11.descr: - &6Heartstone&r usually comes in pairs, and allows the player to seek out another player to whom they've given the second stone.
- Right-clicking the stone sends a particle trail in the direction of the player.
- Getting closer to the target player will also make them glow pink, allowing you to easily spot them.
- Using a map will also reveal the other player on it.
- When the other player dies, your own heartstone will break, repairing itself only when the other players recovers it.
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest12.descr: Gives you permanent &6Night Vision&r effect as long as worn.
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest13.subti: I'm one of you, I swear
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest15.descr: Your mounts are faster when you sit on their back.
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest16.descr: Gives you +1 levels of &6Luck of the Sea&r and &6Lure&r when fishing.
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest16.subti: No fishing quests nor NPC slaughter needed
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest17.descr: All blocks mined drop as if they were destroyed with tool with +1 &6Fortune&r.
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest18.subti: Now you can see me, now you cannot
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest19.descr: Gives you more immunity frames after getting hit.
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest2.descri: Allows you to cheat deah itself once, then disappears.
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest20.descr: Temporarily makes you faster after getting hit.
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest21.descr: Has a chance to struck attacked creatures with &6Lightning&r.
As a bonus makes you immune to Lightning.
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest22.descr: Has a chance to inflict fire on things you hit.
On successful ignite you get &6Fire Resistance&r.
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest22.subti: That sounds just like Fire Gauntlet with some extra steps.
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest23.descr: - &aNo movement penalty while submerged in the liquid&r
ftbquests.chapter.trinkets.quest24.descr: Jump in mid-air to preform a&6 Double-Jump&r.
Height of two jumps combined is about &62.5 blocks&r.
